---
title: "Research"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: working-papers-list
    contents: working-papers
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, date, description]

  - id: talks-list
    contents: talks
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, date, description]
---

# Working Papers

::: {#working-papers-list}
:::

# Talks

::: {#talks-list}
:::
